title: Tech Stack Analyzer Configuration
description: Configuration schema for Tech Stack Analyzer scan configuration files and inline JSON

properties.description: Custom properties added to metadata.properties in scan output

propertyNames.description: Property names must be valid identifiers

exclude.description: Files and directories to exclude from scanning (supports glob patterns)

items.description: Exclude pattern (no path traversal allowed, supports glob patterns **, *, ?)

techs.description: Technologies to add to scan results (even if not auto-detected)

output_file.description: Output file path (relative path, './path', '../path', or '-' for stdout)

paths.description: Paths to scan. Used as fallback when no CLI positional arguments are provided. Supports single or multiple paths (scanned as a unified project). Environment variables (e.g. ${SOURCES_ROOT}) are expanded after parsing.

also_aggregate.description: Also produce an aggregate output alongside the full output. Suffix -agg is added to the output filename. (matches --also-aggregate flag)

sbom.description: Emit an SBOM (with PURLs, for vulnerability scanning) as the primary output instead of the scan tree. (matches --sbom flag)

also_sbom.description: Also write an SBOM alongside the scan output. A format-specific suffix is added to the output filename (.cdx.json or .spdx.json). (matches --also-sbom flag)

sbom_format.description: SBOM format for sbom/also_sbom: 'cyclonedx' (CycloneDX 1.7 JSON, default) or 'spdx' (SPDX 2.3 JSON). (matches --sbom-format flag)

verbose.description: Show progress with simple output (matches --verbose flag)

debug.description: Show progress with tree structure (matches --debug flag)

component_stats_depth.description: Include code_stats on components up to this tree depth in output (0=none, 1=top-level only). Matches --component-stats-depth flag.

subsystem_depth.description: Produce subsystem_stats[] rolled up per depth-N path prefix (0=none, 1=top-level folders). Ignored when subsystem-groups is defined. Matches --subsystem-depth flag.

trace_timings.description: Show timing information for each directory (matches --trace-timings flag)

trace_rules.description: Show detailed rule matching information (matches --trace-rules flag)

primary_language_threshold.description: Minimum percentage (0.001-1.0) for a programming language to be considered primary (default: 0.05 = 5%)

use_lock_files.description: Use lock files (package-lock.json, uv.lock, Cargo.lock, etc.) for dependency resolution with exact versions (default: true)

dependency_graph.description: Emit package-to-package dependency edges: off (default), direct (root->direct only), or full (transitive graph; can be large). (matches --dependency-graph flag)

deps_dev.description: Enable online deps.dev resolution for transitive dependency graphs. Off by default; sends public package coordinates over the network. Requires dependency_graph direct|full. (matches --deps-dev flag)

deps_dev_endpoint.description: Base URL for deps.dev (default: public deps.dev). Override with a deps.dev-API-compatible facade or mirror. (matches --deps-dev-endpoint flag)

maven_central.description: Enable the public Maven Central fallback for resolving Maven BOM/parent POM versions. Off by default; reaches the public internet. Ignored when maven_repo_url is set. (matches --maven-central flag)

maven_graph_source.description: Source for Maven transitive dependency edges (with dependency_graph direct|full): 'repo' crawls the configured Maven repo chain (covers private artifacts), 'deps-dev' uses deps.dev (public only), 'none' offline-only. Default follows deps_dev. A committed dependency-tree.json always wins first. (matches --maven-graph-source flag)

maven_local_repo.description: Resolve Maven BOM/parent POM versions from the local ~/.m2 repository (offline; reads outside the scanned tree). (matches --maven-local-repo flag)

maven_local_repo_dir.description: Override the local Maven repository path (default: MAVEN_REPO_LOCAL / MAVEN_OPTS / ~/.m2/repository). (matches --maven-local-repo-dir flag)

maven_repo_url.description: Remote Maven repository base (e.g. an internal Artifactory/JFrog virtual repo) for BOM/parent POM fetch. Always used when set; Maven Central is not added. Credentials via the STACK_ANALYZER_MAVEN_USER/STACK_ANALYZER_MAVEN_TOKEN environment variables, never in config. (matches --maven-repo-url flag)

maven_settings.description: Path to a Maven settings.xml for repository URLs and credentials (default: ~/.m2/settings.xml). Per-scan override for projects with their own settings. (matches --maven-settings flag)

subsystem-groups.description: Optional named subsystem groups for subsystem_stats rollup. When defined, overrides --subsystem-depth. Each key is a group name, each value defines the depth-1 path prefixes that belong to the group.

base.description: Optional common prefix prepended to all paths in this group (e.g. "/parent/libs"). Avoids repeating the prefix in each path entry.

paths.description: Path prefixes for this group. Relative to base when base is set (e.g. ["feature-a", "feature-b"]), otherwise absolute (e.g. ["/module-a", "/module-b"]).

description.description: Human-readable description of this subsystem group

reclassify.description: Override language detection for files matching glob patterns. Useful for correcting misclassified file extensions (e.g. .e files detected as Eiffel that are actually CSV data).

match.description: Glob pattern matched relative to scan root (supports **). E.g. '**/*.e', '**/generated/**'

language.description: Override language label (should be a language known to GitHub Linguist, e.g. 'CSV', 'C++', 'JavaScript')

type.description: Override language type category. If omitted, type is derived from the language label via go-enry.
